extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule - Updated January 29, 2026
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Northern Border Pipeline (NBPL) hereby notifies customers of the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website. NBPL reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

Changes since last posting:
- Add – Garvin Station 12 Soakwash and Inspection on 2/3
- Add – Wetonka Station 9 Soakwash and Inspection on 2/5
- Add – Manning Station 5 Soakwash and Inspection on 2/10
- Add – Clark Station 10 Soakwash and Inspection on 2/26

Please contact your Northern Border Customer Service Representative with any questions regarding nominations or scheduling at (866) 581-6487.

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance:
2026 NBPL maintenance schedule 012926.pdf
